languages.original_text: "I suppose you are rather proud of such crude and flimsy reasoning. A lamentable sight to behold."

languages.text: "Полагаю, ты весьма гордишься неаргументированной догадкой столь низкого уровня. Весьма прискорбное зрелище".

languages.text: “我看你很得意于自己这套粗陋又站不住脚的推理。真是可悲。”
languages.original_text: "I suppose you are rather proud of such crude and flimsy reasoning. A lamentable sight to behold."

traits.locale_text: “我看你很得意于自己这套粗陋又站不住脚的推理。真是可悲。”

languages.text: «Supongo que estás muy orgulloso de un razonamiento tan torpe y endeble. Una imagen lamentable».
languages.original_text: "I suppose you are rather proud of such crude and flimsy reasoning. A lamentable sight to behold."

traits.locale_text: «Supongo que estás muy orgulloso de un razonamiento tan torpe y endeble. Una imagen lamentable».

languages.text: « J'imagine que vous êtes {mf|fier|fière} de vos pitoyables déductions. Triste spectacle, s'il en est... »
languages.original_text: "I suppose you are rather proud of such crude and flimsy reasoning. A lamentable sight to behold."

traits.locale_text: « J'imagine que vous êtes {mf|fier|fière} de vos pitoyables déductions. Triste spectacle, s'il en est... »

languages.text: "Sanırım böylesine kaba ve çürük bir akıl yürütmeyle oldukça gurur duyuyorsundur. Görülmesi acınası bir manzara."
languages.original_text: "I suppose you are rather proud of such crude and flimsy reasoning. A lamentable sight to behold."

traits.locale_text: "Sanırım böylesine kaba ve çürük bir akıl yürütmeyle oldukça gurur duyuyorsundur. Görülmesi acınası bir manzara."

languages.text: "Ich nehme an, du bist recht stolz auf diese primitive Einschätzung. Ein kläglicher Anblick."
languages.original_text: "I suppose you are rather proud of such crude and flimsy reasoning. A lamentable sight to behold."

traits.locale_text: "Ich nehme an, du bist recht stolz auf diese primitive Einschätzung. Ein kläglicher Anblick."

languages.text: 「そのような粗雑で薄っぺらな論法を、お前はさぞ誇らしく思っているのだろう。嘆かわしい見物だ」
languages.original_text: "I suppose you are rather proud of such crude and flimsy reasoning. A lamentable sight to behold."

traits.locale_text: 「そのような粗雑で薄っぺらな論法を、お前はさぞ誇らしく思っているのだろう。嘆かわしい見物だ」
